hero.tagline: Expert in hemodialysis technology, water treatment systems, medical equipment maintenance, and renal care solutions in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. 3+ years experience with Fresenius 2008K machines and dialysis water purification.

about.title: About Me - Biomedical Engineer
about.role: Professional Biomedical Engineer & Water Treatment Specialist
about.p1: I am a dedicated <1>Biomedical Engineer</1> specializing in <1>Hemodialysis Technology</1> and <1>Water Treatment Systems</1>. With expertise in both hardware and software, I bridge the gap between biological systems and engineering principles.
about.p2: As a freelance biomedical engineering professional, I provide technical support, preventive maintenance, and innovative solutions for renal care facilities throughout Ethiopia. My focus is on ensuring the reliability and efficiency of life-saving medical equipment including Fresenius 2008K hemodialysis machines and comprehensive water treatment systems for dialysis applications.

equipment.title: Medical Equipment Gallery - Hemodialysis & Water Treatment
equipment.subtitle: Specialized expertise in Fresenius 2008K hemodialysis machines, water treatment systems, and medical equipment maintenance
equipment.services_title: Biomedical Engineering Services - Hemodialysis & Water Treatment
equipment.preventive_maintenance_desc: Regular maintenance schedules to ensure optimal performance and patient safety for hemodialysis equipment and water treatment systems
equipment.technical_support_desc: 24/7 technical assistance and troubleshooting for biomedical equipment and water treatment issues
equipment.calibration_desc: Precise calibration and performance testing according to medical standards and regulations for both equipment and water quality
equipment.training_desc: Comprehensive training for medical staff on biomedical equipment operation, water treatment systems, and safety protocols
